name: year
description: Reference year of the index observation

name: half
description: Half of the year for semiannual series, 1 for the first half and 2 for the second half
observations: Derived from the BLS period code S01-S02

name: survey
description: CPI survey population: CPI-U for all urban consumers or CPI-W for urban wage earners and clerical workers
observations: Derived from the series_id prefix (CU or CW)

name: seasonal_adjustment
description: Whether the series is seasonally adjusted (S) or not seasonally adjusted (U)

name: area_id
description: BLS CPI area code identifying the geographic coverage of the series
observations: Codes are CPI-specific (national, regions, size classes, metros); could map to a US geography directory in the future

name: item_id
description: BLS CPI item code identifying the expenditure category of the series
observations: Codes follow the CPI item hierarchy (item.display_level not yet loaded)

name: base_period
description: Index reference base period at which the index equals 100, which varies by series

name: index_value
description: Semiannual Consumer Price Index level for the item, area, and period, relative to the base period

name: semiannual_change
description: Percent change in the index relative to the previous half-year period
observations: Computed by Data Basis from the index series; not published by BLS
